mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO mat_purchase_request_item ( id, tenant_id, request_id, material_id, wbs_task_id, budget_line_id, quantity, unit, planned_date, created_by, updated_by, deleted_flag, remark ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.requestId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.wbsTaskId}, #{item.budgetLineId}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.unit}, #{item.plannedDate}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy}, 0, #{item.remark} )
